name: Standard Chartered DigiSmart Credit Card

categoryRates.description: 5% cashback on EMI transactions converted at POS or online
1% cashback on all other retail purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: Lifetime free card - no welcome benefit

additionalBenefits: 5% cashback on EMI transactions is unique
Lifetime free - no joining or annual fees
pros: 2% cashback on online spends is solid for a free card
Simple cashback model with no complex points
cons: EMI and online cashback caps are low
Standard Chartered has limited branch network
idealFor: Users who frequently convert purchases to EMI
Budget-conscious users wanting a no-fee card with online cashback

faqs.question: How does the 5% EMI cashback work?
faqs.answer: When you convert a purchase to EMI (either at POS or post-purchase via the app), you earn 5% cashback on the transaction value, capped at ₹1,000 per month.

faqs.question: Is there really no annual fee?
faqs.answer: Yes, the DigiSmart is a lifetime free card with no joining, annual, or renewal fees.

faqs.question: How is cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is automatically credited to your card statement within 1-2 billing cycles.
